name: Naruto Isekai RPG: Post-Shippuden
description:
Lorebook Included

Welcome to Konohagakure – Your New Reality

“In a world of chakra and cunning, your old life is your biggest secret—and your only advantage.”

You were just going about your day when reality shattered. Now you’re here: Konohagakure, the Hidden Leaf Village, two years after the Fourth Great Ninja War. The air hums with energy you can’t explain, and the people around you can bend the elements, run on water, and wield power that defies physics. You’re an outsider, with no clan, no chakra, and no clue how to survive in a place where even the bartender might be a trained assassin.

But you’re not entirely helpless. You have knowledge—fragments of a story these people have already lived. You know their secrets, their triumphs, and their tragedies. The question is, what will you do with that power?

“Your first lesson? Everyone here is a weapon. Including you. You just have to decide what kind.”

This bot comes with a massive script. I’m talking dozens of characters (75+ and still adding), dozens of locations, dozens of jutsus, rank structures, summons, descriptions of lore like chakra or the will of fire!

Try the words “missions assignment” or “mission” once you get settled into the village!

if you’re ballin and can spare a dollar, you can fuel my caffeine addiction here

—

Adding in more intros

Characters included:

Anko Mitarashi, Asuma Sarutobi, Asura Ōtsutsuki, Ay (Fourth Raikage), Chiyo, Choji Akimichi, Chōmei (Seven-Tails), Danzo Shimura, Deidara, Fugaku Uchiha, Fū, Gaara, Gengetsu Hōzuki (Second Mizukage), Genma Shiranui, Gyuki (Eight-Tails), Hagoromo Ōtsutsuki, Hamura Ōtsutsuki, Han, Hana Inuzuka, Hanzo of the Salamander, Hashirama Senju, Hidan, Hinata Hyuga, Hiruzen Sarutobi, Indra Ōtsutsuki, Ino Yamanaka, Iruka Umino, Isobu (Three-Tails), Itachi Uchiha, Jiraiya, Jugo, Juubi (Ten-Tails), Kabuto Yakushi, Kaguya Ōtsutsuki, Kakashi Hatake, Kakuzu, Kankuro, Karin, Kiba Inuzuka, Killer Bee, Kisame Hoshigaki, Kokuō (Five-Tails), Konan, Konohamaru Sarutobi, Koyuki Kazahana, Kurama (Nine-Tails), Kurei, Kurenai Yuhi, Kushina Uzumaki, Mabui, Madara Uchiha, Mangetsu Hōzuki, Matatabi (Two-Tails), Mei Terumi, Might Guy, Mikoto Uchiha, Minato Namikaze, Mu (Second Tsuchikage), Nagato (Pain), Naruto Uzumaki, Neji Hyuga, Obito Uchiha (Tobi), Onoki, Orochimaru, Raido Namiashi, Rasa (Fourth Kazekage), Rock Lee, Roshi, Sai, Saiken (Six-Tails), Sakura Haruno, Samui, Sasori, Sasuke Uchiha, Shikamaru Nara, Shino Aburame, Shisui Uchiha, Shizune, Shukaku (One-Tail), Son Gokū (Four-Tails), Suigetsu Hozuki, Teuchi, Temari, Tenten, The Third Raikage, Tobirama Senju, Tsume Inuzuka, Tsunade, Utakata, Yagura Karatachi, Yamato, Yugito Nii, Zabuza Momochi, Zetsu
